project: AuPass — Proof of Provenance for Gold
on_device: OCR — ONNX Latin recognizer + CRAFT detector (via @qvac/sdk)
Rule-based verification — dates, ANM process number, CNPJ/CPF check digit, OCR confidence
SHA-256 canonical seal — node:crypto (CLI) / Web Crypto (browser verifier)

network_use.model_download: First run only: model weights are fetched from the QVAC registry and cached in ~/.qvac/models. After that, the whole pipeline runs fully offline (airplane-mode tested).
network_use.p2p_delegated_inference: Optional demo: the heavy LLM can be delegated to a peer over an end-to-end-encrypted peer-to-peer connection (QVAC over Holepunch's DHT). No server, no cloud API — OCR, verification and the SHA-256 seal stay local.

note: AuPass makes ZERO remote API calls for inference. All AI runs on-device via the QVAC SDK.
